Cinematic key art for a neo-noir thriller film, theatrical one-sheet finish.
Scene: a lone detective in a rain-soaked alley, neon signage reflected in shallow puddles, steam rising from a street vent, the city skyline dissolving into mist behind him.
Camera: eye-level medium-wide composition, subject anchored on the left third, deep layered background, 35mm anamorphic framing.
Lighting: hard teal rim light from the neon signs, warm sodium key from a streetlamp, wet-surface specular reflections, soft ambient fill.
Color grading: teal #1B4F5C shadows, amber #E08E45 highlights, desaturated charcoal #2A2A2E midtones, filmic contrast curve.
Texture/Medium: fine 35mm film grain, subtle halation around light sources, matte theatrical print finish.
AR 16:9
